category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Cambodia.

title.en: China-to-Cambodia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MPTC / TCDB)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入柬埔寨：MPTC / TCDB合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入柬埔寨：MPTC / TCDB合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT device documentation against Cambodia TCDB (Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator) mandatory type approval under the authority of MPTC (Ministry of Post and Telecommunications), Cambodia TCDB EMC conformity requirements, electrical safety requirements (230 V / 50 Hz; IEC 62368-1 basis), in-country authorised importer obligations, Khmer-language labelling preferences, and Cambodia cybersecurity regulatory developments.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa及物联网设备文件与柬埔寨TCDB（电信和数字业务监管机构）在MPTC（邮政和电信部）授权下的强制型式批准、柬埔寨TCDB电磁兼容符合性要求、电气安全要求（230V/50Hz；以IEC 62368-1为基础）、境内授权进口商义务、高棉语标注要求以及柬埔寨网络安全监管发展动态的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa及物聯網設備文件與柬埔寨TCDB（電信和數字業務監管機構）在MPTC（郵政和電信部）授權下的強制型式批准、柬埔寨TCDB電磁相容符合性要求、電氣安全要求（230V/50Hz；以IEC 62368-1為基礎）、境內授權進口商義務、高棉語標注偏好以及柬埔寨網路安全監管發展動態的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, TCDB type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current MPTC/TCDB rules, applicable technical standards, labelling requirements, and Cambodia market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Cambodia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、TCDB型式批准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于柬埔寨销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行MPTC/TCDB规则、适用技术标准、标注要求及柬埔寨市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、TCDB型式批准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於柬埔寨銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行MPTC/TCDB規則、適用技術標準、標注要求及柬埔寨市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: The main Cambodia (MPTC / TCDB) gaps for a China-made wireless, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, or IoT device are: (1) mandatory TCDB type approval for all radio and telecom terminal equipment — SRRC, CCC, FCC, and CE approvals are not recognised as substitutes; (2) TCDB conformity label on the product or packaging; (3) appointment of a locally registered Cambodian authorised importer or agent for TCDB applications and customs clearance; (4) EMC conformity in line with TCDB technical requirements (Cambodia references ASEAN harmonised and ITU-R standards for frequency management; CISPR-based standards referenced for emissions); (5) electrical safety compliance appropriate for 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply (IEC 62368-1 basis); and (6) Khmer-language labelling strongly preferred for consumer products. Cybersecurity requirements are developing as of 2026-06-17. CCC/CE/FCC are not recognised alone by TCDB.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的无线、Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa或物联网设备进入柬埔寨（MPTC / TCDB）市场的主要合规差距为：（1）所有无线电及电信终端设备须强制取得TCDB型式批准——SRRC、CCC、FCC及CE认证均不被认可为替代；（2）产品或包装须贴附TCDB符合性标签；（3）须在柬埔寨境内委任已注册的授权进口商或代理人，负责TCDB申请及海关通关；（4）须符合TCDB技术要求的电磁兼容规定（柬埔寨参照ASEAN协调标准及ITU-R标准进行频率管理；辐射参照CISPR标准）；（5）须满足230V/50Hz市电的电气安全要求（以IEC 62368-1为基础）；（6）消费品高棉语标注为强烈建议。截至2026年6月17日，网络安全要求仍在发展阶段。TCDB不单独认可CCC/CE/FCC。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的無線、Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa或物聯網設備進入柬埔寨（MPTC / TCDB）市場的主要合規差距為：（1）所有無線電及電信終端設備須強制取得TCDB型式批准——SRRC、CCC、FCC及CE認證均不被認可為替代；（2）產品或包裝須貼附TCDB符合性標籤；（3）須在柬埔寨境內委任已登記的授權進口商或代理人，負責TCDB申請及海關通關；（4）須符合TCDB技術要求的電磁相容規定（柬埔寨參照ASEAN協調標準及ITU-R標準進行頻率管理；輻射參照CISPR標準）；（5）須滿足230V/50Hz市電的電氣安全要求（以IEC 62368-1為基礎）；（6）消費品高棉語標注為強烈建議。截至2026年6月17日，網路安全要求仍在發展階段。TCDB不單獨認可CCC/CE/FCC。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or when MPTC or TCDB publishes major rule changes
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true by a named reviewer
